subject: Hey, I just used an invite on you!
body:
Hey!

I have used one of my limited invites to get you in on Metrofunk.com. It's a private invite-only social and mobile network for nightlife, fashion, film, and music. ------------------ Check out this website. I think this company will take off in a year. The work exclusively with Fashion News Daily. ------------------ Here is the link, it's for you only: http://www.metrofunk.com/signup.php?invite=4W53UU See you soon! natalie P.S. If you already have a Metrofunk.com account or for some reason you aren't interested in getting in on this, please let me know so i can save the invite for someone else:
body_html:
Hey!


I have used one of my limited invites to get you in on Metrofunk.com. It's a private invite-only social and mobile network for nightlife, fashion, film, and music.

Check out this website. I think this company will take off in a year. The work exclusively with Fashion News Daily.

Here is the link, it's for you only:
http://www.metrofunk.com/signup.php?invite=4W53UU

See you soon!
natalie

P.S. If you already have a Metrofunk.com account or for some reason you aren't interested in getting in on this, please let me know so i can save the invite for someone else:
